```rust
pub fn from_metrics(metrics: &[ShellPerformanceMetrics]) -> Self
```

Calculates aggregate statistics (avg/p95/p99 execution time, memory growth, success/timeout rates) from a collection of metrics. Test with: empty metrics vec (early return), single metric, multiple metrics with varying exit codes/timeouts/memory growth to verify percentile calculations and rate computations.
